options.name: -all
options.description: Specifies whether to delete all PG pins

options.name: -area
options.description: Specifies the coordinates of the area

options.name: -pg_port
options.description: Specifies to delete pg port with pg shape, or delete pg port based on specified net name from -net option.

options.name: -selected
options.description: specifies whether to delete selected PG pins
